project.name: OpenPaddleMap
project.description: OpenPaddleMap is a mapping and routing tool for canoes, kayaks, and other paddlers.

tags.description: Used to indicate places to access waterways (e.g. put ins and take outs)
Used to indicate boat ramps to access waterways (e.g. put ins and take outs)
Used to indicate beaver dams that may be obstacles for paddlers.
Influences the display of waterway access points on the map to indicate they are not accessible by motor vehicles (e.g. remote portage locations).
Influences the display of waterway access points on the map to indicate they are accessible by motor vehicles.
Used to indicate hazards and used in routing to avoid sending unsuspecting paddlers over the brink.
Used to indicate dams as paddling hazards.
Used to indicate weirs as paddling hazards.
Used to indicate ranger stations as a points of interest to paddlers
Used to indicate campsites as points of interest to paddlers
Used to indicate caravan sites as points of interest to paddlers
Used to indicate rapids as hazards to paddlers and used to influence the routing of paddlers based on their whitewater skill and preference.
Used to indicate floating booms as hazards to paddlers.
Assumed to be navigable by canoe unless otherwise indicated and to indicate possible paddle routes.
